name: Chk_AddNode
title: Chk_AddNode
syntax: dword Chk_AddNode (dword aCheckId, Node aNode, dword aAddress, dword aac, dword ig, dword sys, dword sysi, dword fct, dword fcti, dword ecui, dword mc, dword in);
description: Adds a J1939 node to an existing check.

parameters.name: aCheckId
parameters.description: Check Id of an existing check.

parameters.name: aNode
parameters.description: Name of the node to be checked. Must exist in database.

parameters.name: aAddress
parameters.description: Address of the node.0-253 or 0xFFFFFFFF if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: aac
parameters.description: Arbitrary Address Capable0..1 or 0xFFFFFFFF if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: ig
parameters.description: Industry Group0..7 or 0xFFFFFFFF if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: sys
parameters.description: Vehicle System Instance0..15 or 0xFFFFFFFF if value of database is used.

parameters.name: sysi
parameters.description: Vehicle System0..127 or 0xFFFFFFFF if value of the node in database is used

parameters.name: fct
parameters.description: Function0..255 or 0xFFFFFFFF if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: fcti
parameters.description: Function Instance0..31 or 0xFFFFFFFF if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: ecui
parameters.description: ECU Instance0..7 or 0xFFFFFFFF if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: mc
parameters.description: Manufacturer Code 0..2047 or 0xFFFFFFFF if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: Identity Number0.. 209715 or 0xFFFFFFFF if value of the node in database is used.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
